career_angle: AI agent engineering is the fastest-growing role in tech. If you can build reliable agent systems, you're in high demand.

factors.name: Source Authority
factors.rationale: Ben's Bites classified as tier_4 (lower-tier or promotional source, reliability: 40%)

factors.name: Consensus
factors.rationale: very high hype (10.0/10) -- claim far ahead of consensus; contains counterarguments (contested area)

factors.name: Specificity
factors.rationale: no vague hedging language detected; heavy hype language reduces specificity; contains specific numbers/data; contains data tables/figures

factors.name: Track Record
factors.rationale: Ben's Bites: limited or inconsistent track record; 4 red flags detected (track record penalty: -3); 1 green flags detected (+0.5)
